introSection: Gipfelstürmer is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Freizeitpark Ruhpolding in Ruhpolding, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

fullText:
Gipfelstürmer is a steel shuttle roller coaster at Freizeitpark Ruhpolding in Ruhpolding, Bavaria, Germany.



Single train with 7 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.
